displayName.japanese: デッダイトスレイヤー

description.japanese: 死霊ユニット（ボス）を10体倒した

description.brazilian: Esconda a Mão do Ash em um baú e assuste um Sobrevivente que a encontrar.
description.english: Hide Ash's hand in a chest and scare a survivor who opens it
description.french: Cachez la main d'Ash dans un coffre et effrayez le survivant qui l'ouvre.

description.koreana: 애쉬의 손을 상자에 숨긴 뒤 생존자가 열 때 깜짝 놀라게 하십시오.
description.russian: Спрятать руку Эша в сундук, чтобы испугать выжившего, ищущего поживы

description.brazilian: Realize 10 ataques especiais
description.english: Perform 10 special attacks
description.french: Effectuez 10 attaques spéciales.
description.japanese: 特殊攻撃を10回行った
description.spanish: Realiza 10 ataques especiales.

displayName.german: Wer will noch mal, wer hat noch nicht?

description.brazilian: Realize 100 finalizadores
description.english: Perform 100 finishers
description.french: Effectuez 100 coups de grâce.
description.japanese: 最後の一撃を100回行った

displayName.brazilian: Nunca deixe um amigo para trás

description.brazilian: Reviva um membro da equipe incapacitado 30 vezes

description.spanish: Reanima a un compañero incapacitado 30 veces.

displayName.spanish: De vuelta de entre los muertos
